hardware: AMD Radeon Pro W7900, gfx1100, HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0

diagnostic.purpose: Compare resident MTP verifier-committed target state with a serial AR control after the same committed tokens.
state_compared: linear-attention resident conv/recurrent states for all linear layers
live full-attention K/V prefix for all full-attention layers
selected MTP verifier scratch row vs resident slot after commit

runs.name: decode_batched_chain_tloop_cycles_1_4
runs.command: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 1,2,3,4 --max-cycles 4 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-audit-translation-b1-decode-batched-cycles1-4-20260613.json

runs.name: decode_batched_chain_tloop_gdn_vtile1_cycles_1_4
runs.command: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIPENGINE_GDN_CHAIN_TLOOP_VTILE=1 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 1,2,3,4 --max-cycles 4 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-audit-translation-b1-decode-batched-gdn-vtile1-cycles1-4-20260613.json
runs.interpretation: VTILE=1 changes the bit-drift pattern and fixed earlier forced-handoff probes, but it does not make resident state bit-exact to AR through cycle 4.

runs.name: c1_loop_tree_tloop_cycles_1_4
runs.command: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIPENGINE_VERIFY_CHAIN_LINEAR_TLOOP=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode c1_loop --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 1,2,3,4 --max-cycles 4 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-audit-translation-b1-c1loop-tree-tloop-cycles1-4-20260613.json
runs.interpretation: The slow c1/full-attention plus tree-tloop linear path still has tiny resident-state drift versus serial AR, so bit drift is not unique to decode_batched or chain_tloop.

runs.name: decode_batched_chain_tloop_cycles_32
runs.command: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 4,8,12,16,20,24,28,32 --max-cycles 32 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-audit-translation-b1-decode-batched-cycles32-20260613.json

runs.name: decode_batched_chain_tloop_cycle_26_27_focus
runs.command: env -u HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. timeout 3600 python3 scripts/mtp_state_drift_audit.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-name translation --prompt-render raw --decode-tokens 64 --candidate-budget 1 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --compare-after-cycles 26,27 --max-cycles 27 --out /tmp/hipengine-mtp-state-audit-translation-b1-decode-batched-cycle26-27-20260613.json

conclusions: The single-launch linear-state commit path is not the immediate culprit: selected verifier scratch rows match the committed resident slot bit-for-bit in every compared cycle.
MTP resident state is not bit-exact to serial AR immediately after the first verifier commit, but tokens remain exact until cycle 27 on this trace.
The token-visible fork reproduces the known D64 translation mismatch at context 48: after committing token 19, MTP predicts 51 while serial AR predicts 220.

GDN VTILE=1 and c1_loop+tree_tloop do not eliminate early resident bit drift, so the next audit should compare verifier layer outputs/logits at cycle 27 against a clean AR-prefix control rather than spend more time on fallback thresholds.
next_actions: Add a cycle-27 layer-output/logit comparator that replays the exact root token 19 from both the drifted MTP resident state and a clean AR resident state, then bisection-searches the first layer/stage where the top-1 path diverges.
Use the existing full/linear attention trace hooks for that comparator; keep it diagnostic-only and default-off.
Do not promote D64 AR fallback or adaptive policy defaults until this state drift is fixed or bounded by an exact longer-horizon gate.
